model.sql:
WITH g5a_arrays_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    array(tag_primary, tag_secondary, tag_tertiary) AS tag_array
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  tag_array,
  array_contains(tag_array, '<target_tag>') AS has_target_tag,
  try_element_at(tag_array, 1) AS first_tag
FROM g5a_arrays_source

WITH g5b_maps_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    map(
      'plan_tier', plan_tier,
      'region_code', region_code,
      'sales_channel', sales_channel
    ) AS attribute_map
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  attribute_map,
  try_element_at(attribute_map, 'region_code') AS region_code_from_map,
  map_keys(attribute_map) AS attribute_keys
FROM g5b_maps_source

WITH g5c_structs_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    named_struct(
      'customer_id', customer_id,
      'customer_name', customer_name,
      'region_code', region_code
    ) AS customer_struct
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  customer_struct,
  customer_struct.customer_id AS customer_id,
  customer_struct.region_code AS region_code
FROM g5c_structs_source

WITH g5d_variant_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    try_parse_json(raw_payload_json) AS payload_variant
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  payload_variant,
  variant_get(payload_variant, '$.customer.id', 'string') AS customer_id,
  payload_variant:metrics.amount::double AS metric_amount
FROM g5d_variant_source
WHERE payload_variant IS NOT NULL

WITH g5e_json_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    raw_payload_json,
    from_json(
      raw_payload_json,
      'customer_id STRING, event_type STRING, metric_value DOUBLE, event_ts TIMESTAMP'
    ) AS payload_struct
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  payload_struct.customer_id AS customer_id,
  payload_struct.event_type AS event_type,
  payload_struct.metric_value AS metric_value,
  payload_struct.event_ts AS event_ts,
  raw_payload_json:metadata.ingest_source::string AS ingest_source
FROM g5e_json_source
WHERE payload_struct IS NOT NULL

WITH g5f_xml_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    raw_payload_xml
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  record_id,
  try_element_at(xpath(raw_payload_xml, 'event/customer_id/text()'), 1) AS customer_id,
  try_cast(
    try_element_at(xpath(raw_payload_xml, 'event/metric_value/text()'), 1) AS DOUBLE
  ) AS metric_value,
  size(xpath(raw_payload_xml, 'event/items/item/text()')) AS item_count
FROM g5f_xml_source

WITH g5g_explode_source AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    line_item_ids
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  source.order_id,
  exploded_line_items.col AS line_item_id
FROM g5g_explode_source AS source,
LATERAL explode(source.line_item_ids) AS exploded_line_items

WITH g5h_explode_outer_source AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    line_item_ids
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  source.order_id,
  exploded_line_items.col AS line_item_id
FROM g5h_explode_outer_source AS source,
LATERAL explode_outer(source.line_item_ids) AS exploded_line_items

WITH g5i_posexplode_source AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    line_item_ids
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  source.order_id,
  exploded_line_items.pos AS line_item_position,
  exploded_line_items.col AS line_item_id
FROM g5i_posexplode_source AS source,
LATERAL posexplode(source.line_item_ids) AS exploded_line_items

WITH g5j_posexplode_outer_source AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    line_item_ids
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  source.order_id,
  exploded_line_items.pos AS line_item_position,
  exploded_line_items.col AS line_item_id
FROM g5j_posexplode_outer_source AS source,
LATERAL posexplode_outer(source.line_item_ids) AS exploded_line_items

WITH g5k_inline_source AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    line_items
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  source.order_id,
  flattened_line_items.line_item_id,
  flattened_line_items.line_item_amount
FROM g5k_inline_source AS source,
LATERAL inline(source.line_items) AS flattened_line_items

WITH g5l_stack_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    metric_revenue,
    metric_cost
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  source.record_id,
  stacked_metrics.col0 AS metric_name,
  stacked_metrics.col1 AS metric_value
FROM g5l_stack_source AS source,
LATERAL stack(
  2,
  'revenue', source.metric_revenue,
  'cost', source.metric_cost
) AS stacked_metrics

WITH g5m_json_tuple_source AS (
  SELECT
    record_id,
    raw_payload_json
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  source.record_id,
  parsed_json.c0 AS customer_id,
  parsed_json.c1 AS event_type,
  try_cast(parsed_json.c2 AS DOUBLE) AS metric_value
FROM g5m_json_tuple_source AS source,
LATERAL json_tuple(
  source.raw_payload_json,
  'customer_id',
  'event_type',
  'metric_value'
) AS parsed_json

WITH g5n_tvf_from_source AS (
  SELECT
    generated_ids.id AS synthetic_id
  FROM range(0, 10, 1) AS generated_ids
)
SELECT
  synthetic_id,
  synthetic_id % 2 AS parity_bucket
FROM g5n_tvf_from_source

WITH g5o_lateral_view_source AS (
  SELECT
    order_id,
    line_item_ids
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
)
SELECT
  source.order_id,
  line_item_id
FROM g5o_lateral_view_source AS source
LATERAL VIEW explode(source.line_item_ids) exploded_line_items AS line_item_id

WITH g5p_sequence_source AS (
  SELECT
    entity_id,
    start_date,
    end_date
  FROM {{ source('<catalog>.<schema>', '<table_name>') }}
  WHERE start_date IS NOT NULL
    AND end_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT
  entity_id,
  sequence(start_date, end_date, INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS active_date_sequence
FROM g5p_sequence_source

WITH g5q_range_source AS (
  SELECT
    generated_days.id AS day_offset
  FROM range(0, 365, 1) AS generated_days
)
SELECT
  day_offset,
  date_add(to_date('<anchor_date>'), CAST(day_offset AS INT)) AS calendar_date
FROM g5q_range_source
